title: Convert Item Name to Uppercase automatically
excerpt: Hi, I’m trying to find a way to convert the item name that is generated via jotform to be converted to uppercase in my monday.com board. I can’t see a way to do this via automatations, so I was hoping somebody could advi…

posts.author: Design (Design)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I’m trying to find a way to convert the item name that is generated via jotform to be converted to uppercase in my monday.com board. I can’t see a way to do this via automatations, so I was hoping somebody could advise me?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! We currently do not offer a native feature that will accomplish this.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Design,

This could be accomplished with the Advanced Formula Booster. It is a 3rd-party app that revolutionizes formula in monday.com. Among its unique features, you can target any column.

Therefore you could create a formula that targets the item’s name and is triggered by When an item is created.

The syntax of the formula would simply be:
